overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy riding a horse through open prairies at night. The rider traverses grassy plains, ascends a rocky hillside, and follows a ridge overlooking a misty valley under a dark blue starry sky.

events.description: flock of birds flies overhead against the dark night sky

agents.ego_description: riding horse at steady pace through flat grassland, passing a solitary tree on the left

entered.detail: dark silhouetted hills forming the horizon line against the night sky
solitary deciduous tree standing in the open grassland
open grassy plains with tall wild grass swaying in the wind

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie at night, with the camera following a horseback rider through tall grass. A solitary tree stands on the left while rolling hills silhouette against the dark blue sky. A flock of birds passes overhead as the rider maintains a steady pace across the open terrain.

events.description: terrain changes from grassland to rocky slope as horse begins steep uphill climb

agents.ego_description: guiding horse up steep rocky incline, navigating between boulders and loose stones

entered.detail: large boulders and rocky formations lining the steep hillside
scattered rocks and stones covering the narrow dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The rider transitions from grassland to a steep rocky ascent, with the horse climbing over boulders and loose stones. The terrain becomes rugged and uneven as they navigate the hillside, leaving the open plains behind. The camera follows closely as the path winds upward through the rocky landscape.

events.description: exiting rocky terrain back onto grassy hillside path
misty valley becomes visible in the distance below the ridge line

agents.ego_description: riding along grassy ridge line with expansive view of fog-filled valley below

entered.detail: rolling grassy hilltop path along the ridge line with tall grass
low-lying fog and mist filling the valley floor between distant hills
dense cluster of trees visible in the misty valley below

segments.scene_description: Returning to grassy terrain, the rider follows a ridge path with a sweeping view of a mist-filled valley below. The landscape opens up to reveal distant forests shrouded in fog. The horse maintains a steady pace along the hillside as the camera captures the atmospheric depth of the valley at night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a horseback rider as they transition from an open prairie into a rugged ascent and finally along a high ridge overlooking a misty valley. It begins across a wide expanse of tall grass under a dark blue starry sky, passing a solitary tree as a flock of birds glides overhead. As the rider moves forward, the soft grassland gives way to a steep rocky ascent, with the camera following closely as the horse navigates over boulders and loose stones. The scene then shifts back to grassy terrain as the rider reaches the top of the hillside, following a ridge path that opens up to reveal a sweeping view of a fog-shrouded valley and distant forests below.
